entry.name: cave
entry.domain: game (browser-based simulation on a custom data-driven engine)
entry.architecture: mixed (OO classes with named cleanup + engine subsystems)

analysis.checkNote: Gates per .pdd/config.yaml: no-op-paths blocks; cover-the-mirror, vestigial, silent-failure, boundary-tests, pin-values, disposable-leak warn; trace-requirements off. CI history (ffb7242, 2026-06-05) reports 0 violations. Per-gate finding counts were not recomputed for this public snapshot.
analysis.fullMapNote: Genuine session-authored MAP atlas (experiment map-experiment-linker, 2026-06-07, base commit 182e729): the four-part deliverable (verified code map, footgun register, risk register, silent-failure census) over src/engine/linker (the live content pipeline, 15 production files / 36 green tests, read fresh end-to-end) with a compiler PBT-pilot fold-in. 22 anchored findings (2 code-map, 6 footgun, 7 risk, 4 silent-failure, 3 coverage-gap). Scoped to the linker subsystem, not the full 2297-file codebase. Headline risk is adequacy-unknown: the linker passes its tests but is never mutation-graded.
analysis.gradeNote: Two mutation signals. CI history at ffb7242 reports a project-wide mutationScore of 92.96; the compiler is a well-pinned zone (~92.8-93%, break-threshold 90). The 0.333 grade above is a fresh scoped PIN/PBT pilot on engine/runtime (.pdd/mutation/status.json, 2026-06-11): 40 of 60 mutants survived, surfacing the runtime as under-pinned. The gap between the ~93% pinned compiler and the 33% scoped runtime is the adequacy-unknown theme the atlas flags.
analysis.coverageDetail: 78.45% lines (25367/32333), 76.33% statements, 72.51% functions, 66.7% branches; vitest v8, src-scoped (src/** minus *.test.*), suite green (1128 files, 3378 passed + 1 expected it.fails) at HEAD ef15c4f (2026-06-07). Measured with the same src-scoped command as the rest of the corpus. cave-public's own narrower CI coverage gate reports ~85.2% lines / 79.87% funcs / 70.3% branches at ffb7242.
